label: הליבה
prompt: Premium dark cinematic 3D tech environment, physically based render, deep near-black background #0B0E11 with subtle volumetric haze, dominant neon lime green #C6F24E glow, secondary warm amber #FF8A3C accents, glossy dark reflective floor, holographic wireframe elements, high contrast, empty, unoccupied, no people, no figures, no text, no letters, no logos, cinematic wide 35mm composition. Subject: a vast dark circular hall; at its center floats a luminous lime-green plasma energy core wrapped in delicate concentric wireframe rings, one thin amber ring orbiting at a tilt; glowing energy conduits run from the core across the floor toward a dark corridor opening ahead.
leg: Glide forward from the energy core hall, passing close to the glowing core, into a dark corridor lined with lime energy conduits, and emerge inside a holographic app development studio with floating smartphone screens.
title: בונים את הליבה החכמה של העסק שלך
body: Corewise מפתחת אפליקציות לעסקים ומטמיעה בינה מלאכותית שמתחילה באיפיון מעמיק.

label: אפליקציות
prompt: Premium dark cinematic 3D tech environment, physically based render, deep near-black background #0B0E11 with subtle volumetric haze, dominant neon lime green #C6F24E glow, secondary warm amber #FF8A3C accents, glossy dark reflective floor, holographic wireframe elements, high contrast, empty, unoccupied, no people, no figures, no text, no letters, no logos, cinematic wide 35mm composition. Subject: a sleek app development studio; above a long dark workbench float holographic smartphone frames and translucent lime UI panels with abstract app grids and charts; amber cable conduits run along the walls toward a glowing corridor opening at the far end.
leg: Glide forward out of the app studio through a glowing passage, following the amber wall conduits, and emerge inside a neural network chamber where a giant sphere of glowing connected nodes hovers.
title: בניית אפליקציות לעסקים
body: מערכות ואפליקציות בהתאמה אישית שפותרות בעיה עסקית אמיתית — ווב, מובייל ופנים־ארגוני.

label: בינה מלאכותית
prompt: Premium dark cinematic 3D tech environment, physically based render, deep near-black background #0B0E11 with subtle volumetric haze, dominant neon lime green #C6F24E glow, secondary warm amber #FF8A3C accents, glossy dark reflective floor, holographic wireframe elements, high contrast, empty, unoccupied, no people, no figures, no text, no letters, no logos, cinematic wide 35mm composition. Subject: a neural network chamber; a giant sphere made of hundreds of glowing lime nodes connected by thin light filaments hovers in the center; streams of tiny light particles flow along dark glass walls; a single amber data stream spirals around the sphere.
leg: Glide forward beneath the giant neural sphere, through a dark archway of flowing light streams, and emerge inside a mission-control planning room with four glowing holographic workstations.
title: הטמעת AI שמתחילה באיפיון
body: אוטומציה, צ׳אטבוטים, ניתוח נתונים וסוכני AI — משולבים בתהליכים הקיימים של העסק.

label: התהליך
prompt: Premium dark cinematic 3D tech environment, physically based render, deep near-black background #0B0E11 with subtle volumetric haze, dominant neon lime green #C6F24E glow, secondary warm amber #FF8A3C accents, glossy dark reflective floor, holographic wireframe elements, high contrast, empty, unoccupied, no people, no figures, no text, no letters, no logos, cinematic wide 35mm composition. Subject: a mission-control planning room; four glowing holographic workstations arranged in a row, each projecting a different abstract stage diagram; in the center a large holographic table projects a wireframe building assembling itself from glowing parts.
leg: Glide forward past the central holographic blueprint table, into a corridor whose walls carry pulsing amber circuit traces, and emerge inside a futuristic electronics learning lab with glowing circuit boards.
title: מאיפיון ועד ליווי
body: איפיון, פיתוח בספרינטים, הטמעה בשטח וליווי אחרי ההשקה — תהליך אחד שקוף.

label: הדור הבא
prompt: Premium dark cinematic 3D tech environment, physically based render, deep near-black background #0B0E11 with subtle volumetric haze, dominant neon lime green #C6F24E glow, secondary warm amber #FF8A3C accents, glossy dark reflective floor, holographic wireframe elements, high contrast, empty, unoccupied, no people, no figures, no text, no letters, no logos, cinematic wide 35mm composition. Subject: a futuristic electronics learning lab; dark workbenches carry oversized glowing circuit boards with pulsing amber traces, a small wireframe robot model stands on a pedestal, holographic oscilloscope waveforms float above the benches.
leg: Glide forward across the electronics learning lab, between the glowing workbenches, toward a growing warm glow ahead, and emerge inside a monumental connection terminal where a luminous energy cable plugs into a giant socket portal.
title: AI ואלקטרוניקה לבתי ספר
body: סדנאות, האקתונים והכשרות מורים — התלמידים בונים טכנולוגיה בידיים.

label: בואו נדבר
prompt: Premium dark cinematic 3D tech environment, physically based render, deep near-black background #0B0E11 with subtle volumetric haze, dominant neon lime green #C6F24E glow, secondary warm amber #FF8A3C accents, glossy dark reflective floor, holographic wireframe elements, high contrast, empty, unoccupied, no people, no figures, no text, no letters, no logos, cinematic wide 35mm composition. Subject: a monumental connection terminal; a thick luminous lime energy cable arcs gracefully through the air and plugs into a giant glowing socket portal set in a dark wall, radiating soft concentric light rings; the space feels like a grand final destination.
title: בואו נבנה משהו חכם
body: דברו ישירות עם לידור דהן, מנכ״ל Corewise.
